slashCommand.title: Select Skill or Command
slashCommand.noResults: No matching skills or commands found
slashCommand.hint: Type / to quickly select a skill or command

settings.title: Chat Settings
settings.modelDesc: Select a model for this session. Overrides the global default.
settings.toolCallModeDesc: How to invoke MCP tools: Function Call uses native function calling API; Prompt injects tool descriptions into the system prompt; Disabled turns off tools.
settings.temperatureDesc: Controls randomness. Higher values produce more creative responses, lower values are more deterministic.
settings.topPDesc: Nucleus sampling threshold. Lower values make output more focused; 1.0 considers all tokens.
settings.maxTokensDesc: Maximum number of tokens in the response. Higher values allow longer responses.
settings.contextCountDesc: Number of previous messages to include as context. More context enables better continuity but uses more tokens.
settings.streamingDesc: Stream response tokens in real-time. Disable to receive the full response at once.
settings.systemPromptDesc: Custom system prompt for this session. Overrides the model's default system prompt.
settings.systemPromptPlaceholder: Leave empty to use model default system prompt
settings.customParamsDesc: Extra parameters passed to the API request. Use for provider-specific options.
settings.toolTimeoutDesc: Maximum execution time for a single tool call. If a tool exceeds this time, it will be terminated.

permission.title: Tool Permission
permission.desc: Control how tools are executed. Auto executes all tools automatically; Approve requires confirmation for each tool call.
permission.approveAlwaysDesc: Require confirmation for every tool call
permission.approveExceptAuthorizedDesc: Pre-authorized tools execute automatically, others require confirmation
permission.authorizedToolsDesc: Tools that can execute without confirmation

remoteChat.noRunningBots: No running bots. Please start a bot in IM Bot page first.
remoteChat.chatIdPlaceholder: Enter the chat/group ID to bridge...
remoteChat.chatIdHint: The chat ID or group ID where messages will be sent/received.
remoteChat.setupHint: Create and start an IM Bot first, then come back here to bind it.
remoteChat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message to send to IM...
remoteChat.noBinding: No bot bound to this session
remoteChat.bindPrompt: Bind an IM bot to start sending and receiving messages
